summary:
Brachytherapy involves placing radioactive sources directly within or near tumors to deliver localized, high-dose radiation. This distinguishes it from distant irradiation (Option A/B) or systemic radioactivity (Option D).  

\boxed{C}
formatted_summary:
agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Brachytherapy involves placing radioactive sources directly within or near tumors to deliver localized, high-dose radiation. This distinguishes it from distant irradiation (Option A/B) or systemic radioactivity (Option D).  

\boxed{C}. Answer choice: A
